etymology.description: Triplication of зѕЉ(зѕЉ) (yГЎng, "sheep") -> depiction of multiple sheep
etymology.interpretation: The character зѕґ represents the idea of sheep by triplicating the character зѕЉ(зѕЉ) (yГЎng, "sheep"), emphasizing the presence or abundance of sheep or a sheep-like smell. This form directly conveys the meaning through repetition, serving as an intensifier.
